title: Moss Guardian
wikitext:
{{Otheruses|the quest boss fought during [[Roving Elves]]|the [[Nightmare Zone]] variant|Moss Guardian (Nightmare Zone)}} {{External|rs=Moss giant (Glarial's Tomb)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Moss Guardian |image = [[File:Moss Guardian.png|150px]] |release = [[7 February]] [[2005]] |update = Roving Elves |members = Yes |combat = 84 |size = 2 |examine = Bigger than your average moss giant. |xpbonus = -97.5 |max hit = 14 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Crush]], [[Magical melee]] |attack speed = 6 |respawn = 10 |slayxp = 120 |hitpoints = 120 |att = 60 |str = 60 |def = 60 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 66 |strbns = 62 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |id = 891 }} '''Moss Guardians''' are the guardian spirits of [[Glarial's Tomb]], and are significantly larger and stronger than ordinary [[moss giant]]s. They are encountered during the [[Waterfall Quest]] when the player enters the tomb to obtain [[Glarial's amulet]], and must later be killed during the [[Roving Elves]] [[quest]] to obtain the [[consecration seed]]. They can only be fought unarmed, as it is impossible to take weapons, armour, ammunition or runes into the tomb. They cause a magical splashing effect when they attack. Their attacks first roll against the player's [[Melee]] defence to do melee damage. If that accuracy roll fails, it rolls against the player's [[Magic]] defence to do magical damage.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1576850683340677120|date=3 Oct 2022|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/98683|archivedate=4 October 2022|quote=First it tries standard melee. If that accuracy roll fails, it rolls its melee accuracy against your magical defence to do magical damage.}} Players can use [[Protect from Melee]] to avoid damage from their successful melee attacks, but damage from their magic attacks will still bypass [[Protect from Magic]]. After completion of the [[Roving Elves]] quest, [[Moss Guardian (Nightmare Zone)|a variant of Moss Guardians]] can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]]. Players do not need to be unarmed to attack it there. ==Locations== {{LocTableHead|league=yes}} {{LocLine |name = Moss Guardian |location = [[Glarial's Tomb]] |levels = 84 |members = yes |mapID = 10071 |plane = 0 |x:2528,y:9843|x:2541,y:9845|x:2542,y:9819 |mtype = pin |leagueRegion = Kandarin }} {{LocTableBottom}} ==Drops== ===100%=== {{DropsTableHead}} {{DropsLine|name=Big bones|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsLine|name=Consecration seed|quantity=1|rarity=Always|raritynotes=Only during [[Roving Elves]]}} {{DropsTableBottom}} {{Reflist|group=d}} ===Tertiary=== {{DropsTableHead}} {{DropsLine|name=Long bone|quantity=1|rarity=1/400|gemw=No}} {{DropsLine|name=Curved bone|quantity=1|rarity=1/5012.5|gemw=No}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 1 August 2019 |update = SOTE Changes and Small Game Updates |change = The Moss Guardian was made aggressive again. }} {{Subject changes |date = 25 July 2019 |update = Song of the Elves |change = *The NPC was renamed from "Moss giant" to "Moss Guardian". *The Moss Guardian was made unaggressive. }} {{Subject changes |date = 29 August 2006 |update = Demons, Dragons and Giants |change = The NPC was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Moss Guardian (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Moss Guardian.png|center|300x150px]] |- |7 February 2005 –
